case_title: SHARON K. MYER et al VS. JONES-INTERFASE, L.P. et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MYER, SHARON K. , TRUSTEE OF THE SPICEWOOD TRUST MYER, ROBERT L. , TRUSTEE OF THE LINDSAY A. MYER 1991 TRUST AND THE SCOTT L. MYER 1991 TRUST RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JONES-INTERFASE, L.P. HYTEN, SCOTT INTERFASE MANAGERS, L.L.C. INTERFASE MANAGEMENT, L.P.
